name: Art Director Heuristics (Core)
summary: Core visual planning principles: plan liberally, generate selectively, prioritize ruthlessly.

rules.statement: Plan everything worthy—planning is cheap (tokens), generation is expensive (API costs)
Every image needs a purpose: clarify, recall, mood, or signpost
Create Reference Sheets for recurring elements (characters, locations, objects appearing 2+ times)
Captions are atmospheric: no technique, no spoilers, evocative one-liners
Alt text is accessible: subject + relation + location format
